expectations.text: Creates all four separate Supabase clients (browser, server, middleware, service-role)
Auth callback route uses exchangeCodeForSession for the Google OAuth flow
Middleware returns the mutated response (cookie-sync preserved), not a fresh NextResponse
Includes RLS policy SQL (ROW LEVEL SECURITY) for the role-scoped tables
Signup is role-agnostic; role is chosen in a separate onboarding step, not at signup
expectations.evidence: onboarding path exists: True; signup .ts files assigning a role value: []

expectations.text: No 화물로-specific terms (화주, 기사) anywhere in generated code files (excluding SUMMARY.md commentary)
